title: Breela

'''Breela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Farghul]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], and leader of [[Crimson Nova]], a chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. She was the daughter of [[Mika (Farghul)|Mika]], a bounty hunter who worked during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and hated [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. She was [[Tattoo/Legends|tattooed]] on her face and abdomen; the lines around her navel were similar to those of a [[Zealots of Psusan/Legends|Zealot of Psusan]]. [[Standard year/Legends|Years later]], a grown up Breela, who along with her fellow hunters [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]] and [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], were tracking down [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kai Justiss]], a survivor who escaped [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] years ago and had recently sought refuge on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]], but was betrayed by local [[Farm/Legends|farmers]] to Breela and the others. After a skirmish, during which Master Justiss was able to defeat at least two other combatants and severed the arm of [[Trandoshan/Legends|one]] of them, Breela, Boushh and Zuckuss surrounded him and held him at [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] point.

==Biography==
Breela was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Farghul]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Farrfin]] who rose to prominence as the leader of [[Crimson Nova]], a faction operating within the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="CSWE" /> She was the daughter of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter ]] [[Mika (Farghul)|Mika]], who had previously commanded the Crimson Nova during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[The galaxy/Legends|a galaxy-wide]] war that lasted for a [[Standard year/Legends|few years]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist Alliance]].<ref name="Episode II>''[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones]]''</ref> During that conflict, Mika increasingly devoted the group's efforts to hunting down [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], a focus that ultimately led to her capture by a [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] task force led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. Following her arrest, Crimson Nova was dismantled, and its members dispersed.<ref name="Underworld">{{InsiderCite|89|Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy}}</ref> With the end of the Clone Wars and the [[Declaration of a New Order|rise]] of the Galactic Empire in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Episode III>''[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith]]''</ref> Mika's imprisonment came to an end, allowing her to reunite with her daughter and re-establish contact with the bounty hunting underworld.<ref name="CSWE" />

After her release, Mika managed to restore the Crimson Nova and continued to prioritize the pursuit of surviving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who had managed to evade both [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] and the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Jedi Purge]] throughout the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. During this period, Breela would adopt her mother's hostility toward the Jedi and was gradually introduced into leadership roles within the organization. Once she was considered old enough, Breela succeeded her mother as leader of Crimson Nova and directed its bounty hunters in a campaign targeting Jedi fugitives. Among the hunters with whom she collaborated were [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]] and [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]]. Together, they pursued the Jedi [[Kai Justiss]] after local farmers on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] revealed his location. The encounter escalated into a confrontation between Justiss and the bounty hunters, resulting in several members of Breela’s group being seriously wounded.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Personality and traits==
Breela was a disciplined and determined individual whose outlook had been strongly shaped by her upbringing within the bounty hunting underworld. Raised under the influence of her mother, Mika, she inherited a deep-seated hostility toward the Jedi, whom she viewed as responsible for both her family’s misfortunes and the dismantling of Crimson Nova during the Clone Wars.<ref name="Underworld" /> This resentment hardened over time into a defining motivation, guiding her decisions and priorities as she rose through the ranks of the organization. Breela was pragmatic in her approach, valuing results over ideology and focusing on the successful completion of contracts rather than personal glory.<ref name="CSWE" />

As a leader, Breela was methodical and authoritative, preferring calculated operations over reckless aggression. She demonstrated a willingness to work alongside other bounty hunters when it served her objectives, indicating a practical understanding of alliances within the Guild. While she could be relentless in pursuit of her targets—particularly Jedi—she was not careless with the lives of those under her command and treated serious injuries to her companions as operational setbacks rather than acceptable losses. Overall, Breela was defined by her resolve, her inherited animosity toward the Jedi, and her commitment to maintaining Crimson Nova as a capable and respected force within the bounty hunting community.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The name "Breela" first appeared in ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' as an example of a typical [[Farghul]] name.<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>
